dumpable-ref

(/rk4tau/dump-streams/dump-stream/dumpable-ref)

Here, you specify that a dumpable will be included in a dmp file as a column of figures, and therefore, as a trace when the dmp file is plotted. The dumpable's columns are arranged in the same order as these dumpable-ref elements.

AttributesChildren
  • name

    Table of contents

    Index
